general.description: Carefully handcrafted markings that indicate a captured vessel as belonging to a pirate. Pirate craftsmen take great pride in the aesthetics and details of ship, maybe even more so than the more functional aspects. Detailing a captured ship with pirate branding will immediately make the ship recognizable by other pilots, especially non-clans pirates, who will respect the captain of the ship more. The details are sophisticated enough that any most non-pirate captains are completely unable to tell the ship apart from a regular one. Popular craftsmen have cycles-long waiting lists for their work.
